topic: Area of composite figures made of rectangles
latex:
The figure below, made up of rectangles, represents a room in a house. Micaela wants to lay down carpeting. How much carpeting will she need? Note: All units are in terms of feet.

[DIAGRAM]

The figure shows an L-shaped room with dimensions: top rectangle is $12$ ft wide and $3$ ft tall, with a notch cut out. The left side has dimensions $5$ ft, $3$ ft, and $5$ ft marked vertically. The bottom portion is $12$ ft wide and $7$ ft tall. The middle section shows a width of $13$ ft on the right side.
